description: h2_hold_request=0→1 fix: Test if holding request body before sending block response fixes ReadableStream delivery

db_changes.h2_hold_request: 0 → 1 (buffer full request body before sending block response)
db_changes.hypothesis: With h2_hold_request=0, APF sends block response before browser finishes sending POST body. Browser's fetch() may not properly set up ReadableStream for premature responses. With h2_hold_request=1, request completes first, then response is sent when browser is ready to receive it.

expected_behavior: Warning text visible in chat area (not empty)
